premise: A single adult brunette speaker is filmed at a school morning assembly. The remake package keeps only the live speech beat, rebuilds the meme caption as editable Shotstack text, and omits the final TikTok outro by default.
plot_type: single live speech clip with editable caption overlay

cast.description: One adult brunette woman carries the live-action portion of the clip. The seated students in the background are contextual crowd only, not featured cast.

continuity_rules: Scene_001 centers on one adult female speaker at the podium; background students remain passive and should not become featured characters.
The gymnasium environment stays locked during the live-action scene: bleachers, U.S. flag, wooden podium, and overhead gym lights.
The meme sentence 'prof looking hella thick during morning assembly😫' should be recreated as an editable Shotstack text layer over a clean caption backdrop rather than baked into the base media.
TikTok watermark, username, and the terminal TikTok outro are platform UI only and should not be treated as creative content to regenerate by default.

supporting_character_policy.rationale: The background audience is incidental. The only featured live-action subject is the adult female speaker, and the final platform end card is omitted from the remake package.

scene_arc.beat: Hold on the podium speech moment with the speaker turning slightly as she talks while an editable meme-caption box overlays the scene.
